---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the FIRE Simulator
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Set parameter '...' to '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Device:** [e.g., Desktop, iPhone 15, iPad]
- **Tax Country:** [e.g., DE, US, UK]
- **Dashboard Mode:** [e.g., Beginner, Standard, Advanced]

## Shareable URL

If the bug is related to specific inputs, paste the URL from the address bar (it contains your parameters):

```
https://fire.festas-builds.com/?sk=...
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
